title: Der Richter von Zalamea
writer: Ludwig Berger, Pedro Calderón de la Barca
actors: Lil Dagover, Albert Steinrück, Agnes Straub
plot: Spain at the beginning of the 1580s, at the time of Philip II. The troops of the king entered the village of Zalamea. Captain Don Alvaro is quartered in the house of Pedro Crespo and his two children. Alvaro is very interested in ...
